pr.title: Detect additional coding agents in telemetry
pr.body:
## Summary
- Add Pi detection for CLI telemetry using `PI_CODING_AGENT`.
- Add Amp detection for CLI telemetry using `AMP_CURRENT_THREAD_ID` and gated `AGENT=amp`.
- Add Copilot CLI detection using `COPILOT_AGENT_SESSION_ID` / `COPILOT_CLI`, and reuse `COPILOT_AGENT_SESSION_ID` for `agentSessionId` when present.
- Add Gemini CLI detection using `GEMINI_CLI` and process-name fallback.
- Add Aider, Factory Droid, and Replit Agent telemetry detection using their existing agent env signals.
- Add process-name fallbacks for `pi`, `amp`, `aider`, `replit`, `copilot`, `gemini`, and `factory-droid`/`factory_droid`.
- Include new agent env signals in agent advisory detection so agent setup guidance is shown in those environments.
- Add unit coverage for process-name matching and short-name false-positive avoidance.

## Behavior
- Pi sessions now report `caller = "pi"` instead of falling back to `agent_subprocess`.
- Amp sessions now report `caller = "amp"`.
- Copilot CLI sessions now report `caller = "copilot_cli"` and use the Copilot session ID when available.
- Gemini CLI sessions now report `caller = "gemini"`.
- Aider sessions now report `caller = "aider"`.
- Factory Droid sessions now report `caller = "factory_droid"`.
- Replit Agent sessions now report `caller = "replit"`.

## Test
- `nix shell nixpkgs#cargo nixpkgs#rustc nixpkgs#rustfmt -c cargo test telemetry::tests`
pr.author: codyde
